name: go-env-check
description: Check Go environment and module cache, then run build/vet/test/list/run with optional --quick to skip env checks.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Go command: build (default), vet, test, list (go list -e for quick compilation check), or run (build binary then execute)

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Package path or .go files to check; default ./...

parameters.name: -f
parameters.description: Go list -f format string for list command, e.g. double-brace-dot-GoFiles-close (Go template)

parameters.name: --quick, -q
parameters.description: Skip env check and go mod download, run immediately

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses the Go environment check + module download + build/vet cycle into one step, saving 4-6 agent steps; --quick skips all overhead when modules are already present; -f format enables lightweight package inspection with go list.
